div1.entryFree: Halfpenny, a coin of the value of half a penny: LLL III, 149. V, 2, 563. Hml. II, 2, 282. Plur. half-pence: As III, 2, 372. H5 III, 2, 47. Denoting any thing very small: a h. purse, Wiv. III, 5, 149. thou h. purse of wit, LLL V, 1, 77. she tore the letter into a thousand halfpence, Ado II, 3, 147. Adjectively, == of the value of half a penny: h. loaves, H6B IV, 2, 71.
